title: Chile Declaration of Start of Activities for Natural Persons (Declaración de Inicio de Actividades para Personas Naturales, Formulario 4415-PN)
description: The Servicio de Impuestos Internos' (SII, Chile's tax authority) Formulario 4415-PN, through which a natural person (individual) who already holds a RUT (Rol Único Tributario, Chile's national tax/ID number) declares the start of an economic activity — self-employment, a small business, or professional services — registering with SII as a taxpayer for that activity. This is the natural-person counterpart to a business-formation filing (the closest Business Formation vertical analogue for an individual/sole-trader pathway in this registry) and is also the mechanism by which SII assigns/confirms a taxpayer's first- or second-category tax classification. The form is genuinely downloadable and fillable (a two-page AcroForm PDF hosted directly on sii.cl, HTTP 200, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF gate) for printing and in-person or mailed submission; SII's own current guidance (ChileAtiende ficha 3025) also documents an online submission channel through SII's own web platform, but that channel itself requires an authenticated SII 'Clave Tributaria' or ClaveÚnica session and was not walked live this cycle — this document is derived entirely from the public, unauthenticated PDF form and its own second-page instructivo (which documents section-by-section instructions, the classification table, occupancy-status codes, and tax-regime options), not from a live wizard render. Scoped to the form's own four sections SII's own instructivo names as always mandatory (A. Persona que efectúa el trámite, B. Identificación del Contribuyente, D. Identificación de Actividades Económicas a Desarrollar, E. Domicilio casa matriz, email, domicilio notificaciones) plus the two sections the same instructivo names as conditionally mandatory only for a filer beginning a first-category (Primera Categoría) activity (C. Capital, F. Selección de Régimen Tributario de la Renta) and the first-category-only supplementary domicile block (property ownership status, an optional postal-box address, and an optional urban/rural property address). Deliberately does not model: the separate live online-filing wizard itself (Clave Tributaria/ClaveÚnica-gated, not reachable unauthenticated); the external 'Tabla de Clasificación de Contribuyentes' and 6-digit economic-activity code catalogs the form itself only summarizes a handful of example entries from (SII maintains a >800-entry code catalog on a separate page); the activity-specific supporting-document requirements for special cases (transport-for-hire and mining activities) the instructivo's own §6 names but does not itemize on the form itself; and the reverse-side/back-office 'USO EXCLUSIVO SII' and signature/stamp block, which is not applicant-supplied data. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Chile or the Servicio de Impuestos Internos.

source.documentRef: Formulario 4415-PN, 'Declaración de Inicio de Actividades para Personas Naturales', Servicio de Impuestos Internos (SII), edición 07/2016 (2-page fillable AcroForm PDF, page 2 carries the form's own instructivo)

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle (GOV-1624), opening Chile as the registry's 20th jurisdiction. Screened alongside Brazil's National ID (Carteira de Identidade Nacional) and a Spain candidate (AEAT Modelo 030, NIF registration) before picking this one — see VERIFICATION.md 'Why this candidate' for the full comparison. The live PDF was independently fetched (HTTP 200, Last-Modified 2025-02-13, no login/CAPTCHA/WAF) and its AcroForm field structure extracted programmatically via pdfjs-dist (both the annotation/widget layer — real, descriptive internal field names, not generic placeholders — and the page text layer, cross-referenced by y-coordinate to attach each field to its printed label). No native required/maxLength constraints are asserted on any widget (checked via each annotation's own `required`/`maxLen` properties, all false/0/undefined); required markers instead follow the instructivo's own explicit naming of which of the form's six lettered sections are always mandatory (A, B, D, E) versus conditionally mandatory only for a Primera Categoría filer (C, F). See VERIFICATION.md for the full field inventory, sourcing, and every disclosed judgment call.

fields.name: fechaInicioActividades
fields.label: Fecha de Inicio de Actividades
fields.description: The date the economic activity begins, entered into the DÍA/MES/AÑO box printed at the top of the form. Applicant-entered, per the instructivo's own imperative instruction: 'Deben colocar la fecha de Inicio de Actividades en el recuadro respectivo' (§4.1). A second, adjacent header box labelled 'ROL ÚNICO TRIBUTARIO' has no corresponding fillable widget anywhere on the page (per-glyph coordinate inspection places its label at x≈467, outside this field's widget rect of x≈309–411) — it is presumably a duplicate reference display of the RUT already captured in `rutPersonaTramite`, not a distinct applicant input, and is not modelled separately. See VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, header — 'FECHA DE INICIO DE ACTIVIDADES: DÍA MES AÑO' (AcroForm field `Texto2`)

fields.name: rutPersonaTramite
fields.label: RUT / C.I.
fields.description: RUT (Rol Único Tributario) or cédula de identidad number of the person physically presenting this form — the taxpayer themself or a mandatario/authorized representative acting on their behalf.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección A 'Persona que efectúa el trámite' — 'RUT / C.I.' (AcroForm field `RUT`)

fields.name: apellidoPaternoTramite
fields.label: Apellido Paterno
fields.description: Paternal surname of the person presenting this form.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección A 'Persona que efectúa el trámite' — 'Apellido Paterno' (AcroForm field `APELLIDO_PATERNO`)

fields.name: apellidoMaternoTramite
fields.label: Apellido Materno
fields.description: Maternal surname of the person presenting this form. Modelled as optional: not every applicant (e.g. a foreign-nationality classification under `clasificacionContribuyente`) necessarily carries a second surname, and the source names no per-field mandatory marker (see this document's own verification notes).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección A 'Persona que efectúa el trámite' — 'Apellido Materno' (AcroForm field `APELLIDO_MATERNO`)

fields.name: nombresTramite
fields.label: Nombres
fields.description: Given name(s) of the person presenting this form.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección A 'Persona que efectúa el trámite' — 'Nombres' (AcroForm field `NOMBRE_TRAMITE`)

fields.name: clasificacionContribuyente
fields.label: Clasificación de Contribuyente
fields.description: The taxpayer's own classification, chosen from the form's closed dropdown (source's own option text and numeric codes reproduced verbatim, including the source's own singular/plural inconsistency on code 116).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección B 'Identificación del Contribuyente' — 'Clasificación de Contribuyente (Ver Instrucciones)' dropdown (AcroForm field `seleccion_casificaclion_contribuyente`)

fields.name: apellidoPaternoContribuyente
fields.label: Apellido Paterno
fields.description: Paternal surname of the taxpayer starting the activity (Sección B repeats the name fields independently of Sección A, since the person presenting the form and the taxpayer are not always the same person, e.g. a mandatario).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección B 'Identificación del Contribuyente' — 'Apellido Paterno' (AcroForm field `APELLIDO_PATERNO_CONTRIBUYENTE`)

fields.name: apellidoMaternoContribuyente
fields.label: Apellido Materno
fields.description: Maternal surname of the taxpayer. Modelled as optional for the same reason as `apellidoMaternoTramite`.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección B 'Identificación del Contribuyente' — 'Apellido Materno' (AcroForm field `APELLIDO MATERNO`)

fields.name: nombresContribuyente
fields.label: Nombres
fields.description: Given name(s) of the taxpayer.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección B 'Identificación del Contribuyente' — 'Nombres' (AcroForm field `NOMBRES_ID_CONTRIBUYENTE`)

fields.name: capitalEnterado
fields.label: Enterado M$
fields.description: Initial capital already paid in, expressed in thousands of Chilean pesos (M$) per the form's own column header. Only asked of a filer beginning a Primera Categoría (first-category) activity.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección C 'Capital' (Sólo para contribuyentes afectos a impuestos de primera categoría) — 'Enterado M$' (AcroForm field `ENTERADO_M$`)

fields.name: capitalPorEnterar
fields.label: Por Enterar M$
fields.description: Initial capital still to be paid in, expressed in thousands of Chilean pesos (M$).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección C 'Capital' — 'Por Enterar M$' (AcroForm field `POR ENTERAR M$`)

fields.name: fechaCapitalPorEnterar
fields.label: Fecha Enterar
fields.description: Date by which the remaining ('por enterar') capital will be paid in.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección C 'Capital' — 'Fecha Enterar' (AcroForm field `Texto12`)

fields.name: capitalTotal
fields.label: Total Capital M$
fields.description: Total declared initial capital, expressed in thousands of Chilean pesos (M$).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección C 'Capital' — 'Total Capital M$' (AcroForm field `TOTAL CAPITAL M$`)

fields.name: primeraCategoria
fields.label: Primera Categoría
fields.description: Whether the activity being started is taxed under Primera Categoría (business/capital income — sales, VAT-affected or VAT-exempt goods/services). Mutually exclusive with `segundaCategoria` (a filer marks one or the other, per the instructivo's own 'marcar con una X si es de primera o segunda categoría').
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D 'Identificación de Actividades Económicas a Desarrollar' — 'PRIMERA CATEGORÍA' checkbox (AcroForm field `PRIMERA`)

fields.name: segundaCategoria
fields.label: Segunda Categoría
fields.description: Whether the activity being started is taxed under Segunda Categoría (independent professional services, invoiced via Boletas de Honorarios). Mutually exclusive with `primeraCategoria`.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D 'Identificación de Actividades Económicas a Desarrollar' — 'SEGUNDA CATEGORÍA' checkbox (AcroForm field `Casilla de verificación2`)

fields.name: afectaIva
fields.label: Afecta a IVA
fields.description: Whether the Primera Categoría activity is subject to VAT (sales/services that issue boletas de venta, facturas, etc.). Mutually exclusive with `exentoIva`.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D — 'AFECTA A IVA: Ventas afectas a IVA, emiten boletas de venta, facturas entre otros.' (AcroForm field `AFEWCTAIVA`)

fields.name: exentoIva
fields.label: Exento
fields.description: Whether the Primera Categoría activity is exempt from VAT (sales/services exempt from or not subject to VAT, issuing exempt/non-VAT-affected boletas or facturas). Mutually exclusive with `afectaIva`.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D — 'EXENTO: Ventas o servicios exentos de IVA...' (AcroForm field `EXENTO`)

fields.name: descripcionActividad
fields.label: Descripción de la Actividad
fields.description: Free-text description, in the taxpayer's own words, of the economic activity or activities to be developed.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D 'Identificación de Actividades Económicas a Desarrollar' — 'Descripción de la Actividad' (AcroForm field `DESCRIPCION_DE.LA_ACTIVIDAD`)

fields.name: codigoActividadPrincipal
fields.label: Código(s) de Actividad(es) — Principal
fields.description: 6-digit SII economic-activity code (Código de Actividad Económica) for the taxpayer's principal (P) activity, drawn from SII's own externally-published activity-code catalog (over 800 entries, not reproduced on the form itself and out of scope for this document — see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D — 'Código(s) de Actividad(es)', column 'P' (AcroForm field `CODIGOACTIVIDADES_P`)

fields.name: codigoActividadSecundaria1
fields.label: Código(s) de Actividad(es) — Secundaria 1
fields.description: 6-digit SII economic-activity code for the taxpayer's first secondary (S) activity, if any. The form caps this section at one principal plus three secondary codes ('en caso de más de cuatro, adjuntar Formulario 4416') — a fourth-and-beyond activity is out of scope for this document.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D — 'Código(s) de Actividad(es)', first 'S' column (AcroForm field `CODIGOACTIVIDADES_S`)

fields.name: codigoActividadSecundaria2
fields.label: Código(s) de Actividad(es) — Secundaria 2
fields.description: 6-digit SII economic-activity code for the taxpayer's second secondary activity, if any.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D — 'Código(s) de Actividad(es)', second 'S' column (AcroForm field `CODIGOACTIVIDADES_S_1`)

fields.name: codigoActividadSecundaria3
fields.label: Código(s) de Actividad(es) — Secundaria 3
fields.description: 6-digit SII economic-activity code for the taxpayer's third secondary activity, if any.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección D — 'Código(s) de Actividad(es)', third 'S' column (AcroForm field `CODIGOACTIVIDADES_S_2`)

fields.name: callePrincipal
fields.label: Calle
fields.description: Street name of the main address (casa matriz) — the principal place where the activity will be carried out.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E 'Domicilio Casa Matriz, Email, Domicilios Notificaciones' — 'Calle' (AcroForm field `calle_notificaciones`)

fields.name: numeroPrincipal
fields.label: Número
fields.description: Street number of the main address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Número' (AcroForm field `número_notificaciones`)

fields.name: depOficinaLocalPrincipal
fields.label: Of./Depto/Local
fields.description: Office/apartment/unit number of the main address, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Of./Depto/Local' (AcroForm field `notificaciones_dpto_local`)

fields.name: blockPrincipal
fields.label: Block
fields.description: Housing-block identifier of the main address, if applicable (common in Chilean social-housing addressing).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Block' (AcroForm field `blocknotificaciones`)

fields.name: poblacionVillaPrincipal
fields.label: Población / Villa
fields.description: Named residential development (población/villa) of the main address, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Población / Villa' (AcroForm field `poblacion_villa_notificacion_`)

fields.name: comunaPrincipal
fields.label: Comuna
fields.description: Comuna (Chile's third-level administrative division) of the main address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Comuna' (AcroForm field `comunca_notificaciones`)

fields.name: ciudadPrincipal
fields.label: Ciudad
fields.description: City of the main address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Ciudad' (AcroForm field `ciudad_notificaciones`)

fields.name: telefonoFijoPrincipal
fields.label: Teléfono Fijo
fields.description: Landline telephone number.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Teléfono Fijo' (AcroForm field `teléfono fijo`)

fields.name: telefonoMovilPrincipal
fields.label: Teléfono Móvil
fields.description: Mobile telephone number.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Teléfono Móvil' (AcroForm field `telefono movil notificaciones`)

fields.name: emailPrincipal
fields.label: Email
fields.description: Contact email address for the activity.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección E — 'Email' (AcroForm field `emqil_notificaciones`)

fields.name: rolAvaluoPropiedad
fields.label: Rol Avalúo Propiedad
fields.description: Property-assessment roll number (Rol de Avalúo) of the main address, only asked of a Primera Categoría filer.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Sólo Para Contribuyentes Afectos a Impuestos de Primera Categoría' — 'Rol Avalúo Propiedad' (AcroForm field `rol propiedad`)

fields.name: rutPropietario
fields.label: RUT Propietario
fields.description: RUT of the property's owner, if the taxpayer is not the owner (tenant/usufructuary/assignee).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Sólo Para Contribuyentes Afectos a Impuestos de Primera Categoría' — 'RUT Propietario' (AcroForm field `rut propietario`)

fields.name: calidadOcupacionDomicilio
fields.label: Calidad de Ocupación del Domicilio
fields.description: Occupancy status of the main address, entered as one of the form's own numeric codes: 1 Propietario (owner), 2 Arrendado notarial (notarized lease), 3 Usufructuado (usufruct), 4 Cedido (assigned/ceded), 5 Arrendado Simple (simple/non-notarized lease).
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Sólo Para Contribuyentes Afectos a Impuestos de Primera Categoría' — 'Calidad de Ocupación del Domicilio' and its own legend (AcroForm field `calidad ocupacion del domicilio`)

fields.name: montoArriendoDomicilio
fields.label: Monto Arriendo M$
fields.description: Monthly rent amount, expressed in thousands of Chilean pesos (M$), when the occupancy status is a notarized (2) or simple (5) lease.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Sólo Para Contribuyentes Afectos a Impuestos de Primera Categoría' — 'Monto Arriendo M$' (AcroForm field `monto arriendo`)

fields.name: tieneDomicilioPostal
fields.label: Domicilio Postal
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer also declares a separate postal-box (casilla) address, alongside the main street address in Sección E. The instructivo describes this and `tieneDomicilioUrbano` as conditional ('si tuviera') supplementary address blocks, only available to a Primera Categoría filer.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Postal' block checkbox (AcroForm field `domicilio_postal`)

fields.name: casillaPostal
fields.label: Casilla
fields.description: P.O. box (casilla) number.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Postal' block — 'Casilla' (AcroForm field `casilla primera categoria`)

fields.name: oficinaCorreoPostal
fields.label: Correo
fields.description: Name of the post office/branch (e.g. 'Correo Central') where the postal box is registered — 'Correo' here names a postal branch, not an email address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Postal' block — 'Correo' (AcroForm field `correo categoria`)

fields.name: regionPostal
fields.label: Región
fields.description: Chilean region of the postal address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Postal' block — 'Región' (AcroForm field `region_caetgoria`)

fields.name: comunaPostal
fields.label: Comuna
fields.description: Comuna of the postal address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Postal' block — 'Comuna' (AcroForm field `comuna`, first occurrence — see VERIFICATION.md judgment call on this field-name collision)

fields.name: tieneDomicilioUrbano
fields.label: Domicilio Urbano
fields.description: Whether the taxpayer also declares a separate urban/rural property address, distinct from the postal address and the main Sección E address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block checkbox (AcroForm field `domicilio urbano`)

fields.name: calleUrbano
fields.label: Calle
fields.description: Street name of the urban/rural property address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Calle' (AcroForm field `calle notificaciones`)

fields.name: numeroUrbano
fields.label: Número
fields.description: Street number of the urban/rural property address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Número' (AcroForm field `numeo_notificaciones`)

fields.name: depOficinaLocalUrbano
fields.label: Of./Depto/Local
fields.description: Office/apartment/unit number of the urban/rural property address, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Of./Depto/Local' (AcroForm field `dptolocal_notificaciones`)

fields.name: blockUrbano
fields.label: Block
fields.description: Housing-block identifier of the urban/rural property address, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Block' (AcroForm field `block_notificaciones`)

fields.name: poblacionVillaUrbano
fields.label: Población / Villa
fields.description: Named residential development (población/villa) of the urban/rural property address, if applicable.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Población / Villa' (AcroForm field `poblacionvilla_notificaciones`)

fields.name: ciudadUrbano
fields.label: Ciudad
fields.description: City of the urban/rural property address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Ciudad' (AcroForm field `ciudad:_notificaciones`)

fields.name: rolPropiedadUrbano
fields.label: Rol
fields.description: Property-assessment roll number (Rol de Avalúo) of the urban/rural property address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Rol' (AcroForm field `rol notificaciones`)

fields.name: comunaUrbano
fields.label: Comuna
fields.description: Comuna of the urban/rural property address.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, 'Domicilio Urbano' block — 'Comuna' (AcroForm field `comuna`, second occurrence — see VERIFICATION.md judgment call on this field-name collision)

fields.name: regimenSimplificado14Ter
fields.label: Tributación Simplificada 14 TER
fields.description: Election of the simplified taxation regime under article 14 ter of the Ley de Impuesto a la Renta. Mutually exclusive with the other three regime checkboxes in Sección F.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección F 'Selección de Régimen Tributario de la Renta' — 'Tributación Simplificada 14 TER' (AcroForm field `14ter`)

fields.name: regimenRentaPresunta
fields.label: Renta Presunta
fields.description: Election of the Renta Presunta (presumed-income) regime, available to taxpayers in agricultural, transport, or mining activities. Mutually exclusive with the other three regime checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección F — 'Renta Presunta' (AcroForm field `renta_presunta`)

fields.name: regimenRentaAtribuida14A
fields.label: Renta Atribuida (Art. 14A)
fields.description: Election of the Renta Atribuida regime under article 14A. Mutually exclusive with the other three regime checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección F — 'Renta Atribuida (ART. 14A)' (AcroForm field `14a`)

fields.name: regimenSemiIntegrada14B
fields.label: Semi Integrada (Art. 14B)
fields.description: Election of the Semi Integrada regime under article 14B. Mutually exclusive with the other three regime checkboxes.
fields.sourceRef: F4415-PN p.1, Sección F — 'Semi Integrada (ART. 14B)' (AcroForm field `14b`)

steps.title: Encabezado y A. Persona que efectúa el trámite

E. Domicilio Casa Matriz, Email, Domicilios Notificaciones
Sólo Para Contribuyentes Afectos a Impuestos de Primera Categoría — Domicilio adicional
